openFindings.title: Deep-review phrase boosters still lose primary rank to sk-code-review on auto/release review prompts.
openFindings.impact: Prompts such as 'auto review audit', 'auto review security audit', 'release readiness review', and 'review convergence' return sk-code-review before sk-deep-review even though dedicated phrase boosters exist for sk-deep-review.

openFindings.title: The new proposal-only hyphenated phrase remains below the default confidence threshold.
openFindings.impact: 'proposal-only candidate evaluation' produces sk-improve-agent at 0.78 with passes_threshold=false, so the default filtered advisor output is empty.

openFindings.title: Phrase matching is raw substring matching, so new short phrases fire inside unrelated words.
openFindings.impact: Prompts like 'barcode search issue', 'decode search behavior', and 'precode search cleanup' match the 'code search' booster and route to mcp-coco-index at 0.95.

openFindings.title: Regex-looking phrase booster keys are treated literally and miss natural how-is/how-does code-search prompts.
openFindings.impact: 'how is auth implemented' and 'how does router work' only reach mcp-coco-index confidence 0.77 and are filtered out at the default 0.8 threshold.

openFindings.title: The added regression coverage is happy-path only and does not lock the failing phrase-boundary or deep-review ranking cases.
openFindings.impact: The harness can catch these issues if cases exist, but current new cases do not include negative substring cases, auto-review deep-review prompts, regex-like how-is/how-does prompts, or proposal-only threshold behavior.

openFindings.title: The scoped Vitest parity tests do not consume the local skill_advisor_regression_cases.jsonl fixture.
openFindings.impact: The requested Vitest verification can stay green while the packet-local JSONL phrase fixture would need the Python regression harness to exercise it.
